name: EdwIncomeLoadRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'INCOME' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE x SET x.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC x INNER JOIN cte ON x.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND x.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND x.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND x.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE x.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
JobName:
EdwIncomeLoadRunCycUpdt_EE

EDW Income Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Income with a value "N" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is greater than or equal to the current run cycle used for extracting.
